reviews.text: Mike Curtis & his team are the real deal! Having direct access to their knowledge & resources is priceless. As a disabled Veteran, I knew I needed something the VA & traditional medical facilities couldn't provide, especially in a timely manner. Mike is on it - at a fair cost. He has saved me ALOT of time, energy & money considering the one stop health shop he provides. Beginning with full body & mind bloodwork assessments, then recommendations & regular checkups. Where else can you "pop in" for quick visits & have anytime access to healthy products most men search for? The value is REAL. Along with other perks & beni's like recovery time in the massage chairs, infra-red sauna & cold plunge time, Men's Health of Bowling Green is just a "great escape" to unwind, relax, recover & regain control over your health... before you HAVE to! Overall, as men, when we talk about our mental & physical concerns we want to have a "No BS" professional (& friend) who we can trust & respect. Here, we get that, plus a much needed Medical Man Cave! We want a safe haven where we know we'll get the truth, medical guidance, care & concern so we can best serve our families & friends. We want a "partnership" in our journey to BETTER HEALTH so we can repair past injuries (visible & invisible) & try to recapture lost time... to be more PRESENT in our personal & professional lives TODAY, as we heal & grow into the best version of ourselves. Mike & Cristan Curtis & their team at Men's Health of BG provide a place & service for just that.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ45aPP6HvZYgRZGUM-KitKW8/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKN01ESVZnEAE
reviews.text:
Quick and quality medical care for men with service that’s second to none! Mike is top notch and is there for you anytime you need him. I can message him anytime, with quick response and fast appointment if necessary. Your overall health is his top priority!
It’s easy to see why his practice is rapidly growing. They now offer quick and quality care for women as well! Simply the best care you’ll find anywhere in the area!

reviews.text: I had a great experience at Game Day Men’s Health. From the moment I walked in, the staff was professional, welcoming, and genuinely focused on helping me feel my best. The entire process was straightforward and well-explained, with no pressure—just clear information and a personalized plan based on my goals. The clinic itself is clean, comfortable, and efficiently run, which makes appointments easy to fit into a busy schedule. What really stood out to me was how attentive the team was; they took the time to answer questions and made sure I understood everything. If you’re looking for a place that combines medical expertise with a supportive, low-stress environment, I highly recommend Game Day Men’s Health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJIQmC3--5QYgRG6cl3CMCv2o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsdWIybFNiRGxHZFZnelRXczVkMVppV2twaVdXYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve had a consistently great experience at Gameday Men’s Health in Fort Mitchell. The team is friendly, professional, and genuinely focused on helping you feel better — whether you’re addressing low testosterone, weight issues, or other men’s health concerns. Appointments are easy to schedule, the clinic is clean and welcoming, and staff take the time to answer questions and tailor plans to your goals. Many patients report noticeable improvements in energy, mood, and overall well-being after treatment. Highly recommended if you’re looking for supportive, personalized men’s health care in the area.

reviews.name: places/ChIJIQmC3--5QYgRG6cl3CMCv2o/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s4dFUwRmpkbGhXZGtNMWJHVnZOWGhITkVKVGJHYxAB
reviews.text:
The girls are absolutely incredible — high energy, super fun, and genuinely welcoming from the second you walk in. You don’t feel like “just another customer.” You feel like you’re walking into a room full of your best friends who actually care.
They’re professional, dialed in, and know exactly what they’re doing — but it never feels stiff or transactional. It’s relaxed, upbeat, and real. They bring the energy up without it ever feeling forced. That balance is rare.
You can tell they take pride in what they do. They’re helpful, attentive, and make the whole experience smooth and enjoyable from start to finish.
If you want great vibes, great people, and a place that makes you feel valued instead of processed — this is it.
10/10 or 5/5 lol. No question.

reviews.text:
April 24 2025 given a shot for ED and worked ok. Received my meds 28th April and used the recommended does and got hard for about 2 minutes tried again about May1st same result . Called and they raised my dosage but same issues. Process of giving a shot and waiting for results and having my wife wait seemed mechanical and not very joyful. Tried to cancel  and was told  I had to give them 6 months . I went to the office in October to cancel and signed papers and was told my years contract of $3000. would be credited $600 . I have not seen that amount or any refund on my Care Credit account. Math don't work anyway you use it .
Beware of what you are signing.

reviews.text: The entire experience at the Crestview location has been fantastic.  I was a little hesitant at my first meeting, but the provider Betsy did a great job of explaining my treatment options, and the nurses Nicole, Candice and Jorian are always wonderful when I come in to get my shots. I can't reccomend these guys more, they've given me a new lease on life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJkVe2irW5QYgRg2hY-r1yrSI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGVFpsaHVNVnB5VTB0SE4yeE5SM0ZqZVd0UFRtYxAB
reviews.text: As a 55 year old man, I needed help but didn’t know what to do. After hearing a radio commercial for tri-state men’s health, I thought I would give it a try. I’m glad I did. After a simple and easy blood draw, my testosterone levels were measured and an appropriate dosage was given. Benefits don’t happen overnight, but in a few weeks, I was where I needed to be. It does take time, but I do feel better now in several aspects of my life. Getting the injection is painless, quick and easy. I don’t need an appointment. I just walk in and within a few minutes I’m walking back out. I wish I would have found this service sooner. Highly recommended.

reviews.text: Update. It's been 10 months after premolar extraction. Everything healed up nicely. No pain during extraction and barley any after. Dr. Hargan is great. For people who have a personality issue with Dr. Hargan and say he's rude, I have two words for you....GROW UP. Stop thinking you need to be coddled and told how great you are, how brave you are, how you are doing amazing. If you go in for a tooth extraction it'll be everything it NEEDS to be; quick and painless, the rest is trivial.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9egLIEbvaIgRn7yK8EVp7jM/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUdjZHc2F3EAE
reviews.text: Dr. Hargan is an incredible oral surgeon and also does total life enhancement with BHRT.  I have been a patient of his and refer my patients to him. If you want to have a wonderful dental experience or you want to have your quality of life back with hormone supplementation, look no further.  Wish there was an option for more stars!

I posted several months ago about having to use drugs with a "drug free " treatment but was persuaded to take it down. I'm just trying to help you older men with medical problems not to waste your money. Thanks

reviews.text: My husband and I are very disappointed by the bedside manner of Dr. Zavos. As two medical professionals ourselves, we understand that jokes can sometimes lighten the mood in what can be an sensitive conversations having to do with infertility. However, I was very uncomfortable with some of the jokes and comments made. "It takes two to tango, and his sperm looks fine, so you wouldn't be sitting here unless there was something wrong on the female end. But we won't know until you get in there and pop the hood." There were several other insensitive suggestions that seemed judgmental that I don't feel comfortable sharing on a Google page, but left me crying in the parking lot. Knowledgeable, but would not recommend.

reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful to experience! Dr Zavos and Debra are so kind and welcoming. The office looks like a little house and inside is very warm and inviting. You get to see the swimmers on the big screen and it is so amazing to see. I highly recommend him! Praying we have our little baby girl as I am pregnant first try. Thank you Dr. you are the best! Take care and God Bless!

reviews.name: places/ChIJA37j4FZbQogRZl_yv5Ww8kc/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsM3V5UkZBEAE
reviews.text:
We went to this clinic twice because we have boys and we were trying to have a girl. The first time was last year and I didn’t get pregnant after spending about $7000 between this doctor and his preferred OBGY. This year we paid him and his OBGY again same results I didn’t get pregnant.
We don’t have any fertility problems all we wanted was sperm selection so we could have a girl. When I told this doctor that I was not pregnant he told me I have a problem and that it was like playing the lottery where you either win or lose. What doctor says that to a desperate person looking for something? I was depressed for a couple months. Later I told myself I am going to try to get pregnant without using this fake doctor and his OBGY. I am 7 months pregnant with another boy though this doctor told me I had a problem, made me cry for months because I thought I had fertility issues.
Please don’t go to this place if you want answers, you will spend money and end up with frustration like we did. I will never recommend this doctor to anyone.

reviews.text: As a previous patient of Dr. Meek's, I have nothing but great things to say about her quality of care! My first consultation with her was the first time I felt truly heard about my symptoms and concerns. Her care transformed my life and my gut health! You can trust her.

reviews.name: places/ChIJgdikjhldQogRB92KC8vIpvs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcDRhYV9nRRAB
reviews.text: My experience with Dr. Meek and her staff has been amazing!  I began seeing Dr. Meek in January of 2022 to receive guidance on losing weight.  She ordered an extensive series of test which revealed where I stood in my overall health because she evaluates the whole person and how each part of our health affects the other.  As a result, I have not only lost weight but have experienced many other improvements in my health.  Dr. Meek is very thorough in explaining all tests, she offers suggestions for other valuable resources, she prescribes only necessary supplements, and she values your input in reaching your goals. After all, we as patients must be willing participants and put forth the effort to put our doctors advice into action before results can be seen.  When I tell others about my experience with Dr. Meek, I get responses such as, "you have found a jewel," "you have found the best."  I totally agree!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJgdikjhldQogRB92KC8vIpvs/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLcHY3SEtnEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Meek and her staff are amazing! The office environment is so welcoming, and from the beginning I knew Dr. Meek was someone who would listen to ALL my concerns. For the past year I've used a combination of diet, supplement, and lifestyle changes that we discussed after my testing, and the difference in how I feel is remarkable. After missing out on a year of my life, I'm now back to work and I can hike every weekend if I want!

reviews.name: places/ChIJgdikjhldQogRB92KC8vIpvs/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwOW9PZ29nRRAB
reviews.text: I'm so thankful for Dr. Meek and her practice. I have been dealing with Diverticulitis and until I saw Dr. Meek, my gastro and I could not figure out what was causing the flares! After numerous tests, surprisingly Dr. Meek recognized on my results that I have a unique food sensitivity...since eliminating that food, I have had NO FLARES...this has been life-changing for me! Also, I began making some lifestyle and dietary changes as was suggested by Dr. Meek and have lost 35 lbs. and feel better than I have in many years. I went from being clearly prediabetic to not having this "label" as one of my current illnesses. I understand she does not take insurance, but I'm guessing that she would be willing to set up a payment plan.

If she could have held my hand each time I went in, she would have. She listened so intently and brought some much passion and knowledge to the table! She took her time and made sure we didn't rush through anything, even if I thought we should. She really is the most gifted doctor. The staff there on her team were amazing as well. Very caring, never a moment that we didn't feel completely cared for. I loved the fact too, I saw Dr. Justice for the whole process, minus a couple US, who were done by her NP's and I felt in good hands with them as well.
We prayed for this moment and we know without God, we would not have been delivered to this path and to Dr. Justice who helped bring forth our 1st little one. We can't wait to go back and try for our 2nd little one!

Thank you for our beautiful miracle we conceived with help from Dr. Justice and team at Fertility Endocrine & Associates.

God bless!

reviews.name: places/ChIJnQcmOc0KaYgR2tYB7bpVJD8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paV1ZYVnliV2hzY1VKVVVuWmpaRmxXZEZKUVdVRRAB
reviews.text:
We graduated today! 🎓💕

A huge thank you to Dr. Tiffany Justice and her amazing team for making this dream possible. I cannot recommend them enough — truly a 10/10 experience for anyone starting or growing their family.

Dr. Justice was so kind and patient, allowing every emotion to flow freely, even while I was on the exam table. She made sure everything was perfect for our transfer and took the time to explain every detail so that my husband and I felt completely confident and cared for.

I also wanted to state that with this experience I was met with an actual doctor for every appointment. I don't know if that is a game changer for anyone else, but it sure was for me. My husband and I tested out the other local clinic when we first started. And I'm not here to bash any practice, but being told that you only see the doctor for transfer day and if something is wrong is a little bit disheartening. Even though the other clinic had really nice staff, I much rather that one on one with the doctor and hearing the live explanation while Wanda (the wand ultrasound) is picking up images vs just a portal message that doesn't provide the reassurance that things will be okay.

Also thank you for keeping the gender a secret for us! We can't wait to welcome our very first baby in June 🤍🤍

I’m endlessly grateful to Dr. Justice for helping make this moment a reality!

It is not an office where you have to rotate doctors or speak to multiple nurses to get an answer there is one doctor with one nurse and one person at the front office. It is like walking into a family reunion every time you go… Dr Farmer remembers your medical history without you having to remind him of anything. He follows up immediately with any concerns or test results. He is also a walking encyclopedia.

Hormone therapy needs. Dr. Farmer is where you need to go! I had zero energy, 34 years old and went into post menopause. He had immediately tested my levels, ordered a personalized prescription specific to my needs and in no time I was back to myself and able to care for my kids and family. I had seen multiple specialists but NO one got to the root of the issue like he did. He is truly incredible. Can’t recommend him enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJdRgd-9IKaYgRQ3qPxXcDkNY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeE1xZW13RRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Farmer is the absolute BEST! I was in labor for 15 hours and he came in to monitor me and the baby because our heart rates were low. He told me I was going to have an emergency c-section and at least 10 nurses and Dr. Farmer had me transported from my room, to the delivery room with the baby delivered in 15 minutes. Had it not been for Dr. Farmer and his quick thinking, my son, who had a prolapsed cord would not be here today. Dr. Farmer has delivered all three of my boys and I would never go anywhere else. Thank you Dr. Farmer for saving my miracle baby!

reviews.name: places/ChIJdRgd-9IKaYgRQ3qPxXcDkNY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBbXNEdXlBRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Farmer is the best there is!  He has been my doctor since I moved to Louisville.  I started seeing him in 2001 and was referred by a couple of family members who did not steer me wrong!  He has delivered both of my healthy boys (ages 6 & 12 now) and has treated me for endometriosis, fibroid cysts, and hormone replacement therapy.  He performed both of my C-sections (as I was unable to deliver either child naturally), and a hysterectomy.  He has always been very attentive and professional, but personable.  His staff are friendly and helpful and very knowledgeable about his treatments.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdRgd-9IKaYgRQ3qPxXcDkNY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZNW96VWRREAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Farmer was my mom's doctor, and has been mine since I've been 18 and I trust his experience. To say I am disappointed is an understatement. I always assumed I'd have to find a new doctor because he'd retire; seems like it may be in my best interest to find a new facility before he does finally retire.

It's been three weeks, or more now; I've lost count....I was told after the initial appointment I didn't need to do anything but wait for annual test results and come back for an ultrasound. I called about about a week after the ultrasound and was asked about the blood work...no one told me I needed to do that before I left the original appointment. I even made a point to verify my next steps before I left that day. I've since had the blood work done. For those keeping score; that makes three trips to the office in a month...and have not heard back. I've called only to be told I will get a call back. I suppose no new is good news?....But I would expect someone to call me with some news because I'm still experiencing the same symptoms. Communication seems to be an issue in the office.

reviews.text:
*Warning the monthly cost maybe 250 Dollars a month or more*
*Please read before you go here*
As per the conversation with the scheduler; the first appointment cost was 99 dollars that would cover cost of blood work, first appointment, and medication if deemed necessary, which is not how this played out. After being told I would qualify for medication I was hit with fact that they are not going to send RX to pharmacy but order it for you and it be delivered to the office which would cost me 250 dollars a month. I should have stayed in the parking lot and burned a 100 dollar bill. Thanks for the miscommunication and making a deemed necessary treatment out of reach for me, I wouldn't be upset if the monthly payment was explained upfront instead of being hit by that after the appointment was over. I can say the office / staff were nice, but you can tell while your there they will try and up sell unnecessary add-on treatments ( NAD ) which is not FDA approved to treat anything. When you are on the phone with the scheduler, ask about monthly cost, ask about the cost of the office visit, don't be like me and go here without proper questions and research.

reviews.text: Optimize U Murray is such a great place if you are looking for a personalized clinic that will focus on improving you. The staff, providers and owners are friendly and helpful. After the meeting I was able to discuss further with one of the nurses on site, Shane, who continued the conversation further. We talked about services and prices and I learned optimizing your health was very affordable. My testosterone levels were in the low normal range that would of typically been accepted as ok. We talked about having what is considered normal levels of testosterone but not feeling good. I started out taking Enclomiphene testosterone treatment by pill form and saw great results. I felt great and took a lot less caffeine to get motivation  to go to the gym. I am now doing testosterone injections and seeing more muscle definition and feeling awesome. The recovery sessions are amazing. I try to do two sessions of cryotherapy and leg compressions weekly to help keep joints and muscles recovered from training. Riley is very friendly and helps to make sure I have everything I need during recovery. They have infrared sauna too. I highly recommend Optimize U hormone therapy and recovery for anyone seeking to improve their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ2Z7hQmdaYgR-o7om0vbW3c/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCbVVHWkRMVUZ4VkZCMmFIQmZiR1ZEY1RKeFoyYxAB
reviews.text:
I wasn’t sure what to expect when I went for my first visit, but Madison made me feel comfortable and let me know what options I had being a 61yr old, overweight male looking to improve his life through some lifestyle changes. There was no pressure to do anything which is what sold me on doing something. I have more strength, energy and stamina, sleep better, and have lost 20lbs in just over 2 months.
If you’re not happy with your current physical/emotional state, do yourself a favor and go see Madison.

reviews.text: Marshall Lifestyle Medicine has truly exceeded our expectations! Lauren and Madison have treated my fiancé and me like family, and we’re so grateful. I’ve noticed such a big difference since starting here, and I genuinely look forward to my visits. Lauren, Madison, and everyone else I’ve met are so kind, down-to-earth, and it’s clear they truly care about what they do. So glad you all came to Louisville!
